steps.title: Solve the system
steps.content:
Multiply the second equation by $4$, then add it to the first equation.
$$4(4x-y)=4(19)$$
$$16x-4y=76$$
$$(x+4y)+(16x-4y)=-8+76$$
$$17x=68$$
$$x=4$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: Now substitute $x=4$ and $y=-3$ into $3x-5y$. $$3(4)-5(-3)=12+15=27$$ The answer is 27.
